name: Domain Tools
description: Domain tools for Switchbay. Check if a domain is available, check if a domain is a valid TLD, and more.

tools.name: check_domain
tools.description: Validate a domain name and check whether its TLD is recognized. Availability lookup is not yet implemented.

domain.description: The domain to check, e.g. example.com

tools.name: check_tld
tools.description: Check whether the TLD of a given domain is recognized (e.g. .com, .io, .dev).

domain.description: The domain whose TLD to check, e.g. example.io
